allow: Bash(python -c "import yfinance as yf; t=yf.Ticker\('AAPL'\); print\('=== ticker.info keys ==='\); print\(sorted\([k for k,v in t.info.items\(\) if v is not None]\)[:60]\); print\('=== Has dividends ==='\); print\(hasattr\(t, 'dividends'\)\); print\(hasattr\(t, 'actions'\)\); print\('=== Has financials ==='\); print\(hasattr\(t, 'financials'\)\); print\(hasattr\(t, 'balance_sheet'\)\); print\(hasattr\(t, 'cashflow'\)\); print\(hasattr\(t, 'earnings'\)\); print\(hasattr\(t, 'quarterly_financials'\)\); print\(hasattr\(t, 'quarterly_balance_sheet'\)\); print\(hasattr\(t, 'quarterly_cashflow'\)\); print\(hasattr\(t, 'quarterly_earnings'\)\); print\(hasattr\(t, 'recommendations'\)\); print\(hasattr\(t, 'sustainability'\)\); print\('=== info relevant keys ==='\); info=t.info; [print\(f'{k}: {v}'\) for k,v in sorted\(info.items\(\)\) if v is not None and k in ['trailingPE','forwardPE','priceToBook','marketCap','enterpriseValue','dividendYield','payoutRatio','beta','trailingEps','forwardEps','bookValue','revenueGrowth','earningsGrowth','grossMargins','operatingMargins','profitMargins','returnOnEquity','debtToEquity','currentRatio','quickRatio','totalRevenue','ebitda','freeCashflow','operatingCashflow','totalCash','totalDebt','sharesOutstanding','floatShares','shortRatio','shortPercentOfFloat','heldPercentInsiders','heldPercentInstitutions','analystTargetPrice','recommendationKey','numberOfAnalystOpinions','earningsDate','exDividendDate','lastSplitDate','lastSplitFactor','sector','industry','country','currency','exchange','market','fiftyTwoWeekHigh','fiftyTwoWeekLow','averageVolume','fiftyDayAverage','twoHundredDayAverage']]")
